title: A sparkling bean-like UFO was spotted in Porto Alegre-RS [1995]

text_preview:
MARCH 20th, 1995. Time: 18h15. Duration: 30 seconds. When walking on a cottage in the region of Porto Alegre, State of Rio Grande do Sul, three people spotted “a sparkling, half-rounded, bean-like object” of white color flying at high speed. According to witnesses, the UFO was flying on a straight trajectory towards the south at high altitude, and was observed with the naked eye in a clear sky of a sunny afternoon.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.393. “Quest
summary: Three people near Porto Alegre spotted a sparkling white bean-shaped UFO flying at high speed southward at high altitude for 30 seconds on March 20, 1995.
